reasoning: The key limiter is your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Following your extended rest, we need to reignite your engine with focused intervals simulating the demands of the Alpine Loop. Emigration Canyon will help simulate the climb dynamics while we improve your endurance to minimize power drop-off.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12 minutes: alternate every 2 minutes between 201W and 242W. 5-minute easy spin between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
